svg.text: Best run AL-20260329-027 reached 1.3582 val_bpb. 32 scored runs are tracked here, with 12 kept and 20 discarded.
Latest run: AL-20260329-028 (discard) tested the untied frontier may instead want less saturation, so a looser `LOGIT_SOFTCAP=40` could improve it.
Read agent_lab/state.md for the live dashboard and agent_lab/tranches.md for the tranche map.
